name: Broken Bow Scalloped Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange a layer of potatoes in a greased 2-quart casserole.
2. Cover with some of the onion.
3. Sprinkle some of the combined flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Dot with some butter.
5. Repeat layers until all are used, ending with butter.
6. Pour milk over all.
7. Sprinkle with paprika.
8. Bake, covered, in a slow oven (325°F) for 1 hour.
9. Uncover and bake for an additional 20 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Yield: 4 servings.
